compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

D:\\Learn-Harsh\\lamda_pratice\\myprojec.serviceRawFile:
# "org" ensures this Service is used with the correct Serverless Framework License Key.
org: personaluse2
# "service" is the name of this project. This will also be added to your AWS resource names.
service: myproject

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: us-east-1
  environment:
    AWS_EXECUTION_ENV: true
    InventoryQueue: !Ref MessageQueue
    Sns : !Ref MyTopic

  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
          - dynamodb:PutItem
          - dynamodb:Query
          - dynamodb:UpdateItem
          - dynamodb:DeleteItem
          Resource: 
            - !GetAtt ProductTable.Arn
            - !Sub "${ProductTable.Arn}/index/*"

build:
  bundler: esbuild
  esbuild:
    bundle: true
    minify: false
    sourcemap: true
    target: node20
    platform: node
    external:
      - "@aws-sdk/*"
      - "/opt/nodejs/db"
      - "/opt/nodejs/validate"
      - "/opt/nodejs/sqs"
      - "/opt/nodejs/sns"
      - "/opt/nodejs/cognito"
      - "/opt/nodejs/verify"
  
package:
  individually: true
  patterns:
    - '!node_modules/**'
    - '!test/**'
    - '!.git/**'
    - '!.serverless/**'
    - '!*.log'



plugins:
  #- serverless-esbuild
  # Uncomment to easily set up a custom domain. Read the docs for more details:
  # https://www.serverless.com/framework/docs/providers/aws/guide/domains
  # domain: api.example.com
layers:
  dynamoLayers:
   path: src/layers/nodejs
   name: dynamo-layer
   description : DynamoDB SDK Layer
   compatibleRuntimes:
    - nodejs20.x
functions:
  AddProduct:
   handler: src/Product/product.handler
  #  layers: 
  #    - { Ref : DynamoLayersLambdaLayer}
   events:
    - httpApi:
        path: /addproduct
        method: post

  ListProduct:
    handler: src/Product/listProduct.handler
    # layers: 
    #   - { Ref: DynamoLayersLambdaLayer}
    events:
     - httpApi:
        method: GET
        path: "/listproduct"
  
  UpdateProduct:
    handler: src/Product/updateProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          method: PUT
          path: "/updateproduct/{id}"

  DeleteProduct:
    handler: src/Product/deleteProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          method: delete
          path: "/deleteproduct/{id}"

  SendMessage:
    handler: src/Product/sendMessage.handler
  
  ReceiveMessage:
    handler: src/Product/receieveMessage.handler

  PublishMessage:
    handler: src/Product/publishMessage.handler
  
  SignUp:
    handler: src/Product/signup.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          method: POST
          path: "/signup"

  Login:
    handler: src/Product/login.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          method: POST
          path: "/login"

  
    
  



resources:
  Resources:
    ProductTable:
     Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
     Properties:
      TableName: Inventory
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: PK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: SK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: GS1PK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: GS1SK
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: PK
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: SK
          KeyType: RANGE
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: GS1 
          KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: GS1PK
            KeyType: HASH
          - AttributeName: GS1SK
            KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST

    DeadLetterQueue:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: Inventory-dead
        MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600

    MessageQueue:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: Inventory
        MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
        RedrivePolicy:
          maxReceiveCount: 3
          deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt  DeadLetterQueue.Arn 
    
    MyTopic:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
      Properties:
        TopicName: CreateOrder

    MySubscription:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
      Properties:
        Protocol: sqs
        Endpoint: !GetAtt MessageQueue.Arn
        TopicArn: !Ref MyTopic

    QueuePolicy:   # 👈 ADD HERE (same level)
      Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
      Properties:
        Queues:
          - !Ref MessageQueue
        PolicyDocument:
          Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Principal: "*"
              Action: "sqs:SendMessage"
              Resource: !GetAtt MessageQueue.Arn
              Condition:
                ArnEquals:
                  aws:SourceArn: !Ref MyTopic

compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
